w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: “Comment” in the table means if any deviation exists, please give the rationale to clarify why you consider the deviation acceptable.
sing public information as the encryption key

wp:docPr.name: Picture 5
wp:docPr.descr:
黑白色的标志

pic:cNvPr.name: Picture 5
pic:cNvPr.descr:
黑白色的标志

w:r.w:t: without human intervention at the equipment;
via scheduling the installation of an update under human approval
via triggering the installation of an update under human approval or supervision where there is the need to prevent any unexpected damage in the operational environment
Update with integrity and authenticity check
Pre-installed password needs to be changed by the user in the initialization status.

w:r.w:t: and the authenticator is unique per device.
and the authenticator is common every device.
with authentication and unique pre-installed password or user-defined password in initialization status.
Used by the hardware or physical protection:
(sudo/sudo su root) with univeral password for specified purpose
oot can be used (sudo/sudo su root)
root can be used with unique password per device
Normal account can be used to access

w:r.w:t: Will it be completed in a short period of time?
Do you need an expert-level service?
Is it possible to avoid destruction?
Can be completely removed without damage + Ordinary tools = Low attack potential = Unqualified
The need to damage PCB/chip packaging = high attack potential = acceptable
